description:
Roll-up epic for the non-blocking-but-must-fix-before-a-public-launch gaps from the cold-context ship-readiness assessment (2026-06-22). These don't stop `mix hex.publish` from running, but shipping without them yields a messy/embarrassing first public release.

Independent of the hard-blockers epic (mutagen-y8o) except where noted — most can land in parallel.

## Children
- H1: `package: [files:]` whitelist (control what ships; exclude dev cruft)
- H2: fix `mix test --cover` (currently 3 failures + a crash)
- H3: reconcile README v1.0/v1.1 version labels with 0.1.0
- H4: fix or escalate baseline_red guard rail (relates mutagen-wrd.37)
- H5: GitHub Actions CI (mix test + mix test.integration)
- H6: README annotated JSON output example + user-facing CHANGELOG pass
title: [EPIC] hex.pm publish — hygiene & correctness gaps
